# Guitar

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Guitar;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Guitar { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
acoustic, instrument, strings, riff, rock, band, country, concert, performance, play, lead, loud, music, audio, sound, noise

multimedia
